Headline: Spider Loc
Description: Curtis Williams  (born January 19, 1976), more commonly known as Spider Loc, is an American rapper and actor. He was formerly signed to Interscope Records and 50 Cent's G-Unit Records.

Headline: 2005 All-Ireland Senior Hurling Championship final
Description: The 2005 All-Ireland Senior Hurling Championship Final was a hurling match that took place on Sunday, 11 September 2005. The match was played at Croke Park in Dublin, Ireland, to determine the winner of the 2005 All-Ireland Senior Hurling Championship. The final was contested by Cork and Galway, with Cork winning on a score line of 1–21 to 1–16. It was their second consecutive All-Ireland title.

Headline: Natsuse Dam
Description: Natsuse Dam is a gravity dam located in Akita Prefecture in Japan. The dam is used for power production. The catchment area of the dam is 637.4 km2. The dam impounds about 86  ha of land when full and can store 5959 thousand cubic meters of water. The construction of the dam was started on 1938 and completed in 1940.[1]

Headline: Clifford John Earle Jr.
Description: Clifford John Earle, Jr. (November 3, 1935 – June 12, 2017) was an American mathematician who specialized in complex variables and Teichmüller spaces.
